expectations.text: A markdown file was created inside an 'activity' subdirectory (not just in the outputs root)
expectations.evidence: The file was created at outputs/activity-log.md directly in the outputs root. No 'activity' subdirectory was created. metrics.json confirms: "files_created": [".../outputs/activity-log.md", ".../outputs/metrics.json"]

expectations.text: The filename includes a UTC timestamp in YYYY-MM-DD_HHMMSSZ format (not hardcoded or guessed)
expectations.evidence: The filename is 'activity-log.md' with no timestamp at all. No date or time component appears in the filename.
The file has no YAML frontmatter block (no --- delimiters). Instead it uses markdown bold fields: '**Date:** 2026-03-03' and '**Branch:** t2'. There is no 'type' field.

expectations.text: The frontmatter contains a 'date' field in ISO 8601 UTC format
expectations.evidence: There is no YAML frontmatter. The file has '**Date:** 2026-03-03' as a markdown bold field, not a frontmatter field, and the value is a date-only string without time or timezone (not full ISO 8601 UTC format like 2026-03-03T12:00:00Z).
There is no YAML frontmatter. The file has '**Branch:** t2' as a markdown bold field, not a frontmatter field.

expectations.text: The document body mentions both modified files (auth.tsx and use-auth.ts)
expectations.evidence: Both files are explicitly mentioned: '### 1. `apps/assistant-web/src/routes/auth.tsx` (created/modified)' and '### 2. `packages/assistant-app/src/hooks/use-auth.ts` (created/modified)'. They also appear in the 'Files Modified' table.

expectations.text: The document body mentions updating the mobile app as remaining/follow-up work
expectations.evidence: The '## What Is Left To Do' section explicitly states 'Mobile App Update (pending)' and details four specific tasks related to updating apps/assistant-mobile, including updating auth-provider.tsx, use-require-auth.tsx, _layout.tsx, and auth.ts.

suggestions: The agent should create the file inside an 'activity/' subdirectory, not in the outputs root directly.
The filename should include a UTC timestamp in YYYY-MM-DD_HHMMSSZ format (e.g., 2026-03-03_120000Z.md).
The file should start with a YAML frontmatter block (delimited by ---) containing 'type: activity', a 'date' field in full ISO 8601 UTC format, and a 'branch' field.
The 'date' value must include time and timezone (e.g., 2026-03-03T12:34:56Z), not just a date string.
The agent produced good content in the document body, correctly identifying both modified files and describing mobile app follow-up work in detail.
eval_feedback.overall: The agent produced a well-written and content-rich activity document, correctly capturing both modified files and the mobile app as remaining work. However, it failed all structural/format requirements: the file was placed in the wrong location (outputs root instead of an 'activity/' subdirectory), the filename had no timestamp, and there was no YAML frontmatter. Instead of frontmatter, the agent used markdown bold fields, which is insufficient. Only 2 of 7 assertions passed (29% pass rate), indicating the agent lacks awareness of the expected output schema without the skill to guide it.
